strengths: Three well-identified, specific objects situated in clear historical, cultural and social contexts
Consistent and clear links made between each object and the IA prompt, with factual details supporting most claims
Strong structural organization with section headers and object labeling guiding the reader
Effective use of images (Apple I photograph, Baghdad siege illustration, woodcut of printing press) to ground analysis
Comparative conclusion synthesizes the three objects to reinforce the exhibitionâs overarching message
weaknesses: Analysis sometimes slips into narrative description without explicitly drawing out TOK implications
TOK terminology and explicit reference to course concepts (ways of knowing, knowledge frameworks, justification) are only lightly employed
Counter-perspectives are mentioned but not developed in depth
Some assertions (e.g., Jobsâs lack of formal knowledge as decisive) are oversimplified and only partially evidenced
Inconsistent citation style and occasional placeholder or incorrect reference formatting
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs exhibition clearly meets the descriptors of the 7â8 band: three objects are well contextualized, and the links to the chosen prompt are consistently explained and supported by evidence. The structure is coherent and the comparative synthesis adds depth. However, the analysis does not consistently employ precise TOK language or fully explore counter-perspectives, and occasional narrative digressions weaken the TOK focus. These limitations place the work at the lower end of the 7â8 band, justifying a final score of 7.

annotations.comment: This analysis adeptly connects the printing press to shifts in institutional power and knowledge distribution, demonstrating clear engagement with the prompt.
The discussion here reiterates earlier points and would benefit from deeper insight into how new knowledge was justified and validated in emerging Protestant networks.

Overall, the student demonstrates strong research and context-setting. To reach the highest level, deepen TOK engagement by explicitly invoking Ways of Knowing, Areas of Knowledge, and terms such as âjustificationâ, âevidenceâ, and âframeworksâ.

Consider integrating explicit reference to TOK course materialâsuch as knowledge frameworks and justification processesâto provide a more robust theoretical underpinning throughout the exhibition.
The selection of the Baghdad siege illustration is powerful and immediately situates the viewer in a concrete historical context, reinforcing the objectâs real-world specificity.
Restating the IA prompt at the outset provides clear focus and ensures the exhibition remains anchored to its guiding question.

The introduction offers a basic definition of knowledge and ignorance but remains too generic. To strengthen its TOK framing, explicitly reference concepts such as justification, perspective, or knowledge communities and outline how these will be explored in the exhibition.
Clear and consistent use of section headers enhances the structure of the exhibition and guides the reader smoothly through each object.
This analysis successfully links power struggles to the suppression of knowledge, directly addressing the promptâs concern with implications of not having knowledge.
Consistent object labeling maintains coherence and helps the reader navigate the exhibitionâs progression from one case study to the next.
Including a photograph of the Apple I grounds the analysis in a tangible artifact, supporting the argument with a clear visual reference.
This section thoughtfully connects outsider perspective to innovative knowledge creation and ties back to the prompt by illustrating how lack of formal knowledge can catalyze new insights.

The conclusion for Object 2 remains one-sided. To deepen analysis, consider potential drawbacks of lacking formal knowledge, such as increased risk of error or limited peer review within knowledge communities.
The comparative conclusion effectively synthesizes the three objects, highlighting contrasting outcomes and reinforcing the overall exhibition message.
The citation headerâs HTML structure appears inconsistent; adopting a uniform citation style (APA or MLA) would improve professionalism and readability.
Several citations contain placeholder numbers and inconsistent author formats. Verifying each reference for accuracy and consistency will strengthen the exhibitionâs academic rigor.

This vivid narrative of the siege is informative but predominantly descriptive. It would benefit from tighter integration with the TOK prompt by highlighting explicitly how persecution hindered knowledge production and justification processes.

While identifying a recurring theme, the discussion lacks precise TOK terminology (e.g., âjustificationâ, âknowledge frameworksâ). Incorporating such vocabulary would enhance conceptual clarity and depth.

The claim that Jobs and Wozniak âlacked expertiseâ is oversimplified. Provide evidence of their actual technical abilities or counterarguments to justify how unconventional backgrounds affected their knowledge production.
The consistent structure and labeling for Object 3 enhance the readerâs ability to compare cases effectively.
The woodcut illustration is well-chosen and the detailed alt text underscores the studentâs attention to context and historical specificity.

Description of the printing press remains primarily factual. To strengthen TOK relevance, explore how mass printing altered the reliability and dissemination of knowledge within different communities.
Counter-perspectives are mentioned but not fully developed. Exploring dissenting viewpoints more thoroughly for each object will enrich the analysis and demonstrate critical engagement.

rubricCriterionStrandBandContents.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported
assertions.

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.

rubricCriterionStrands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
